## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the primary user flow affected by this PR
- [ ] I checked web, mobile, CLI, and desktop impact where relevant
- [ ] I updated docs, copy, or setup guidance where needed
- [ ] I checked that no generated files, caches, secrets, or local-only artifacts were included
- [ ] I considered permissions, approvals, and other security boundaries
- [ ] I noted any untested areas or follow-up work
